scripts.build: vite build && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && vite build --config vite.background.config.ts
scripts.zip: npm run build && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue quickreply.zip; tar -a -cf quickreply.zip -C dist manifest.json content.js background.js assets icons _locales src"
